notes: FROZEN (daemon=incapable): kiro-cli 2.5.1 CAN spawn parallel sub-agents (/spawn + use_subagent), but a spawned child writes its own independent ~/.kiro/sessions/cli/<uuid>.jsonl with NO parent reference in any field the adapter reads (JSONL keys=version/kind/data; sidecar marks session_created_reason='subagent' but has no parent_id at any depth) — so irrlicht cannot link the child to the parent or hold the parent working. No spec phases until a parent-link reaches an adapter-readable Source. Same architecture limit as codex. Observations recorded for when unblocked: kiro JSONL carries no model/token/cost (sidecar metering is credits; token counts are 0).
